ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of transaction (e.g., Borrow, Return) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the transaction occurred */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who processed the transaction */,
  "access_number" INTEGER /* Unique access number for the document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower making the transaction */,
  "patron_number" REAL /* Patron number assigned to the borrower */,
  "listed_patron_name" TEXT /* Name of the listed patron */,
  "transaction_comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the transaction */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the borrowed item */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Return date for the borrowed item */,
  "is_renewed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the item has been renewed */,
  "renewal_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the item has been renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_access_number FOREIGN KEY ("access_number") REFERENCES library_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patrons" (
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patron */,
  "patron_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patron */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patron */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the patron joined the library */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the patron */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patron */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patron */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patron */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patron */,
  "preferred_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred library branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patrons_preferred_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the item */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., book, magazine, journal) */,
  "publish_year" INTEGER /* Year the item was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number for the item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the item (e.g., available, checked out) */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the item */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the item */,
  "physical_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the item in the library */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_items_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the branch */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the branch */,
  "open_hours" TEXT /* Open hours of the branch */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being audited */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the change occurred */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_audit_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_audit_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fines" (
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fine record */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who incurred the fine */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the fine payment */,
  "paid_status" TEXT /* Status of the fine payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item for which the fine was imposed */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction for which the fine was imposed */,
  "fine_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fine (e.g., overdue, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES library_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holds" (
  "hold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hold record */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who placed the hold */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being held */,
  "hold_date" TEXT /* Date when the hold was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the hold (e.g., active, fulfilled) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the hold was placed */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the hold (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "expected_availability_date" TEXT /* Expected availability date for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES library_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, librarian) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the user is associated with */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., Due Soon, Hold Available) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the notification was sent from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type (e.g., Book, Journal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Borrow, Return) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction detail record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated transaction */,
  "item_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item at the time of return (e.g., Good, Damaged) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Returned on Time, Overdue) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item associated with the transaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES library_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
